mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM market_daily WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO market_daily (symbol, trade_date, open, high, low, close, volume, amount, turnover_rate, limit_up, limit_down) VALUES
(#{item.symbol}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.open}, #{item.high}, #{item.low}, #{item.close}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount}, #{item.turnoverRate}, #{item.limitUp}, #{item.limitDown})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open = VALUES(open), high = VALUES(high), low = VALUES(low), close = VALUES(close), volume = VALUES(volume), amount = VALUES(amount), limit_up = VALUES(limit_up), limit_down = VALUES(limit_down)
